title: forsythia × intermedia f. vitellina
intro: Forsythia × intermedia f. vitellina, also known as the 'Vitellina' or 'Golden Ball', is a cultivar of the forsythia plant, a member of the olive family (Oleaceae) and a deciduous shrub native to East Asia. Forsythia × intermedia f. vitellina has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other compounds. The health benefits of forsythia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of forsythia, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
